user.title: Connect to Nectr
user.description: Enter your Nectr email and password.

account.title: Choose account
account.description: Pick the Nectr account to import, how many days of past usage to backfill once at setup, and your tariff rates so usage cost can be tracked on the Energy dashboard.

data_description.peak_rate: Cost per kWh during the peak window.
data_description.offpeak_rate: Cost per kWh outside the peak window.
data_description.peak_start_hour: First hour of the peak window, in your account's local time. The default 15 means peak starts at 3pm.
data_description.peak_end_hour: End of the peak window (exclusive). The default 21 means the last peak hour is 8pm and 9pm onward is off-peak.

reconfigure.title: Update tariff
reconfigure.description: Update the peak and off-peak rates and the peak window used to calculate usage cost. New rates apply to the next import; previously imported costs are not recalculated.

data_description.peak_rate: Cost per kWh during the peak window.
data_description.offpeak_rate: Cost per kWh outside the peak window.
data_description.peak_start_hour: First hour of the peak window, in your account's local time. The default 15 means peak starts at 3pm.
data_description.peak_end_hour: End of the peak window (exclusive). The default 21 means the last peak hour is 8pm and 9pm onward is off-peak.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Nectr. Please try again.
error.no_accounts: No Nectr accounts were found for this login.

abort.already_configured: This Nectr account is already configured.
